# Naxely

> AI-powered PDF report generator. Turn CSV files and Google Sheets into branded, professional PDF reports with AI-written insights, charts, and tables.

Naxely is a SaaS platform that lets you upload a CSV file or connect a Google Sheet, configure custom branding (your logo, colors, fonts), and generate a polished multi-page PDF report with AI-written analysis, charts, and a custom cover page. Built by Deepanshu Garg.

## Features

- **CSV & Google Sheets import** — Upload CSV files or connect Google Sheets with read-only OAuth authorization
- **AI-powered insights** — AI-written summaries, analysis, and recommendations using your choice of provider (Groq, OpenAI, Gemini, Claude, DeepSeek, Mistral, Together AI)
- **Custom branding** — Add your logo, brand colors, custom fonts (Fraunces + IBM Plex), and a cover letter
- **Charts & tables** — Bar, line, pie, area, and donut charts; auto-detect column types; customizable data tables
- **PDF export** — Download generated reports as polished PDFs
- **Share & embed** — Share reports via a public link with optional expiry date; embedded iframe support
- **Scheduled reports** — Upload data once and schedule recurring report generation (Pro and Agency tiers)
- **White-label sharing** — Branded share page without Naxely footer (Agency tier)
- **Dark mode** — The app supports a dark mode UI

## Pricing

- **Free** — 1 report, 3 AI credits, 50-row limit, Naxely branding, no scheduled reports
- **Pro ($19/mo)** — Unlimited reports, 100 AI credits/mo, 50k-row limit, custom branding, scheduled reports, remove Naxely branding
- **Agency ($49/mo)** — Everything in Pro plus unlimited AI credits, 500k-row limit, 5 team seats, white-label sharing
